auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Demodesk API key sent as a Bearer token. Generate one in Demodesk under Settings > Integrations > Other, as described in the official API reference: https://demodesk.com/api/docs/index.html

actions.name: batch_get_recording_transcripts
actions.description: Get transcripts for up to 100 Demodesk recording tokens in one request.

lang.description: Language code used to request an on-the-fly translation.

format.description: Transcript response format to request from Demodesk.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Demodesk recording transcripts in batch.

anyOf.description: A structured or plaintext transcript payload.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the Demodesk user represented by the current API key.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting the current Demodesk user.

email.description: Primary email address of the user.

role.description: Role of the user within the company.

timeZone.description: IANA time zone of the user.

groups.description: Groups the current user belongs to when returned by Demodesk.

actions.name: get_recording
actions.description: Get one Demodesk recording by public recording token.

recordingId.description: Internal recording ID as a string.

demoId.description: Internal demo ID as a string.

userId.description: ID of the demo host user.

recordingWebUrl.description: URL to the recording view in Demodesk.

anyOf.description: Temporary direct video file URL when available.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the recording was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the recording was last updated.

anyOf.description: Recording duration in milliseconds when available.

groupIds.description: Group IDs assigned to the demo in list responses.

meetingLocation.description: Meeting location metadata returned by Demodesk.

participants.description: Participants returned on a recording detail response.

groups.description: Groups assigned to the recording in detail responses.

actions.name: get_recording_transcript
actions.description: Get the transcript for one Demodesk recording token.

lang.description: Language code used to request an on-the-fly translation.

format.description: Transcript response format to request from Demodesk.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Demodesk recording transcript.

anyOf.description: Plaintext transcript when plaintext format was requested.
Upstream Demodesk status payload for non-ready states.

actions.name: list_recording_scorecards
actions.description: List scorecards linked to a Demodesk recording.

anyOf.description: User ID of the score giver when available.

receiverUserId.description: User ID of the score receiver.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the scorecard was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the scorecard was last updated.

actions.name: list_recording_summaries
actions.description: List AI-generated summaries attached to a Demodesk recording.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the summary was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the summary was last updated.

actions.name: list_recordings
actions.description: List Demodesk recordings with cursor pagination and optional filters.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by a previous Demodesk list response.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return. Demodesk allows 1 to 100.

anyOf.description: Multiple filter values for an in-style recording filter.

filters.description: Demodesk recording filters keyed by documented Ransack-style names, such as host_eq or status_in.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Demodesk recordings.

recordingId.description: Internal recording ID as a string.

demoId.description: Internal demo ID as a string.

userId.description: ID of the demo host user.

recordingWebUrl.description: URL to the recording view in Demodesk.

anyOf.description: Temporary direct video file URL when available.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the recording was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the recording was last updated.

anyOf.description: Recording duration in milliseconds when available.

groupIds.description: Group IDs assigned to the demo in list responses.

meetingLocation.description: Meeting location metadata returned by Demodesk.

participants.description: Participants returned on a recording detail response.

groups.description: Groups assigned to the recording in detail responses.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the next page when available.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List active Demodesk users visible to the current API key.

search.description: Case-insensitive search across user full name and email.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by a previous Demodesk list response.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return. Demodesk allows 1 to 100.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Demodesk users.

email.description: Primary email address of the user.

role.description: Role of the user within the company.

timeZone.description: IANA time zone of the user.

groups.description: Groups the current user belongs to when returned by Demodesk.

anyOf.description: Cursor for the next page when available.
